eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Idaho; Malheur, OR; Lincoln, MT; Spokane, WA; at 3:42 PM on MAY 20, 2019 Effective until 5:42 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
This is an activation of the amber alert system.  This is the Idaho State Communications Center. We have just received this important information regarding a child abducted in Jerome Idaho in Jerome County. The Jerome County Sheriff is looking for a child who was last seen at 2 8 1 6 south Lincoln ave Sunday 5/19/2019 at 6 PM and is believed to be in danger. The childs name is Sandra Rios Chaves. She is a 17 year old, female with black hair and was last seen wearing a Wendy's uniform and a grey sweatshirt. 
Authorities say that the child may be in the company of Miguel R Rodriguez Perez and they may be traveling in a 2015 black Audi A 4 license plate 2 J 8 3 1 7 9 that was last seen heading towards Las Vegas. If you have any information on the where abouts of this child, please contact Jerome County Sheriff at 2  0  8  3  2  4  4  3  2 8 immediately
